case_title: ZOLTAN EGERESI VS. CONTINENTAL SERVICE SOLUTIONS LLC, AN ILLINOIS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF EGERESI, ZOLTAN AS TO DEFENDANT CONTINENTAL SERVICE SOLUTIONS LLC, AN ILLINOIS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
